head.title: MyAnimeList.net - Anime and Manga Database and Community

meta.content: Welcome to MyAnimeList, the world's most active online anime and manga community and database. Join the online community, create your anime and manga list, read reviews, explore the forums, follow news, and so much more!
meta.name: description

meta.content: MyAnimeList.net - Anime and Manga Database and Community

Welcome to MyAnimeList, the world's most active online anime and manga community and database. Join the online community, create your anime and manga list, read reviews, explore the forums, follow news, and so much more!

div.div:
Visit MALxJapan
MALxJapan -More than just anime-
KyoAni’s New Anime Sparks of Tomorrow: Latest Info & Exclusive Interview 💡
Watch "ConBiz!" ー a new Japanese business entertainment program
Forget the textbooks and laugh your way to nihongo mastery with Real Real Japan 👺

a.title: Sunrise, Shaft Produce 'Fool Night' Anime Adaptation for 2026 Premiere

h3.a: Sunrise, Shaft Produce 'Fool Night' Anime Adaptation for 2026 Premiere

div.p:
Netflix announced an anime adaptation of Kasumi Yasuda's Fool Night manga at its Anime Studio Focus panel at the Annecy International Animation Film Festival on Tuesday, revealing the main cast, a teaser visual (pictured), and a teaser promotional vi...
read more

41 minutes ago by
mobulidae
|
Discuss (3 comments)

a.title: 'The Ribbon Hero' Unveils Additional Cast, Theme Song, Second Trailer

h3.a: 'The Ribbon Hero' Unveils Additional Cast, Theme Song, Second Trailer

div.p:
The official website of the The Ribbon Hero original anime movie revealed additional cast and a second trailer on Tuesday. The anime movie based on Osamu Tezuka's Ribbon no Kishi (Princess Knight) manga will debut worldwide exclusively on Netflix on...
read more

2 hours ago by
mobulidae
|
Discuss (1 comment)

a.title: 'Mujikaku Seijo wa Kyou mo Muishiki ni Chikara wo Tare Nagasu' Unveils Additional Staff, Third Promo

h3.a: 'Mujikaku Seijo wa Kyou mo Muishiki ni Chikara wo Tare Nagasu' Unveils Additional Staff, Third Promo

div.p:
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Almond's Mujikaku Seijo wa Kyou mo Muishiki ni Chikara wo Tare Nagasu: Imadai no Seijo wa Ane dewa Naku, Imouto no Watashi Datta Mitai desu (The Oblivious Saint Can't Contain Her Power: Forg...
read more

12 hours ago by
Syureria
|
Discuss (0 comments)

a.title: 'Fuun kara no Saikyou Otoko' Reveals Main Staff, 2027 Debut

h3.a: 'Fuun kara no Saikyou Otoko' Reveals Main Staff, 2027 Debut

div.p:
Production company Asmik Ace opened an official website for a television anime adaptation of Fukufuku's Fuun kara no Saikyou Otoko (The Strongest Man, Born from Misfortune) light novel on Tuesday, revealing the main staff, an image song, and a teaser...
read more

Yesterday, 9:52 PM by
Syureria
|
Discuss (1 comment)

img.alt: Why Japan-only items rarely reach global stores

a.title: Why Japan-only items rarely reach global stores

p.a: Why Japan-only items rarely reach global stores

div.div: Japan produces some of the most sought-after anime merchandise, but much of it never makes it overseas. From limited releases to shipping restrictions, here's why these items stay locked in Japan and how fans can still access them.

div.p:
by
MAL_editing_team

2,481
views

img.alt: Cast your vote in the "Twilight Frontiers" Writing Contest! 🐝

a.title: Cast your vote in the "Twilight Frontiers" Writing Contest! 🐝

p.a: Cast your vote in the "Twilight Frontiers" Writing Contest! 🐝

div.div: The "MAL × Honeyfeed Writing Contest 2026 – Twilight Frontiers", presented by Frontier Works, has reached its final stage, and the top 10 stories have been selected. Your vote helps decide which 3 authors win $3,000. Vote now!

div.p:
by
MAL_editing_team

25,105
views

img.alt: Interview: Kyoto Animation's New TV Anime, Sparks of Tomorrow

a.title: Interview: Kyoto Animation's New TV Anime, Sparks of Tomorrow

p.a: Interview: Kyoto Animation's New TV Anime, Sparks of Tomorrow

div.div: In our exclusive interview with Director Minoru Ota, we go behind the scenes to explore how Kyoto Animation is bringing to life a story that intertwines invention, emotion, and the pursuit of connection in a rapidly changing era.

div.p:
by
MAL_editing_team

32,511
views

img.alt: What Isekai Fantasy story do you think should be adapted by KADOKAWA?

a.title: What Isekai Fantasy story do you think should be adapted by KADOKAWA?

p.a: What Isekai Fantasy story do you think should be adapted by KADOKAWA?

div.div: Here are the 10 finalists from the second MAL × Honeyfeed Writing Contest of 2025! Your vote will help decide which web novels will become the next big Isekai hit. Check them out and cast your vote!

div.p:
by
MAL_editing_team

51,617
views

# CODE GEASS : ## Strong Points : *Code Geass delivers at creating exciting moments, dramatic twists, and an excellent central MC.* * Lelouch is easily the strongest aspect of the series, carrying much of the story through his intelligence, internal struggles, difficult decisions. * The show frequently delivers memorable emotional scenes, strong...
read more

img.alt: Higeki no Genkyou to Naru Saikyou Gedou Last Boss Joou wa Tami no Tame ni Tsukushimasu. Season 2

h3.a: Higeki no Genkyou to Naru Saikyou Gedou Last Boss Joou wa Tami no Tame ni Tsukushimasu. Season 2

div.p:
While Season 1 was incredibly catchy and solid, Season 2 felt considerably weaker by comparison. On the positive side, this season expanded the characters and deepened the bonds with other nations, successfully moving the plot beyond Freesia into two new kingdoms. However, it still lacked several key elements for me.
The first season gave us much...
read more

Miku et Nino mérite + que Yotsuba mais vzy Yotsuba jt'aime bien mais chepa la blague elle est longue la faut donner ta bague à Miku un moment donné nan ??? Nan en vrai le film est bien j'ai vrm kiffé mais juste dommage que y'a pas les 4 autres fins, mais à part ça même si je trouve que la fin est discutable (surtout que c'est celle que j'aime le moins...
read more

this a slice of life story that heavy into Shinto mythology following Minato that becoming the caretaker of a distant relative retirement property a nice one bedroom Japanese house at the base of a mountain. unknown to Minato the house is thick with miasma from evils spirit that eh can't see like the majority of the population but his handing writing...
read more

div.div: Supernatural theme. MC with ability to see and interact with souls and spirits. Kinda like Supernatural SoL.

Anime rec by
Pyr8King
- 2 hours ago
Aho Girl and Asobi Asobase are both chaotic school comedies, but Aho Girl focuses on one stupidly funny girl while Asobi Asobase is about multiple girls with equally insane behavior.

Anime rec by
DarnRyn
- 3 hours ago

If you liked Aho Girl, Gabriel DropOut is worth watching. Both share a similar style of school comedy driven by eccentric characters and chaotic, often nonsensical humor that focuses more on reactions...
read more

Anime rec by
DarnRyn
- 4 hours ago

if you enjoyed 86, then Violet Evergarden is a must-watch. Both series focus on war aftermath, emotional trauma, and deep human drama, delivering a heavy but meaningful exploration of suffering, loss,...
read more

Anime rec by
DarnRyn
- 4 hours ago

div.div:
It’s time to ditch the text file.
Keep track of your anime easily by creating your own list.

p.a: Do Not Sell or Share my Personal Information
